title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. delphineae
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. delphineae, also known as the Delphine Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. It is an herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The Delphine Orchid is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
